match.userMessage:
Match the following library locations to extracted script locations. The user specifically selected these 1 library locations for visual consistency.

EXTRACTED LOCATIONS FROM SCRIPT (4 total):
- Location ID: loc_vanity
  Name: INT. VANITY ROOM - MORNING
  Type: interior
  Time of Day: morning
  Description: Small intimate vanity space with a white tabletop vanity table and a small round mirror. Morning sunlight cuts dramatically across the white surfaces creating warm highlights and soft shadows.
  Architectural Style: minimal bright interior
  Key Features: white vanity table, round mirror, slim white box for lipstick
  Ambiance: peaceful intimate morning ritual

- Location ID: loc_street
  Name: EXT. STREET OUTSIDE STUDIO - MORNING
  Type: exterior
  Time of Day: morning
  Description: Bright street outside a studio doorway transitioning into open daylight
  Architectural Style: urban coastal street
  Key Features: open studio door, bright street light
  Ambiance: fresh morning transition outdoors

- Location ID: loc_promenade
  Name: EXT. PROMENADE - MORNING
  Type: exterior
  Time of Day: morning
  Description: Oceanfront promenade with low wall leading toward the beach, surfers visible in the background water
  Architectural Style: coastal promenade
  Key Features: low wall, ocean view, distant surfers
  Ambiance: open airy coastal morning

- Location ID: loc_beach
  Name: EXT. BEACH SHORELINE - MORNING
  Type: exterior
  Time of Day: morning
  Description: Sandy beach shoreline where waves meet wet sand, with visible broken coral shells and shallow water
  Architectural Style: natural beach
  Key Features: wet sand, small waves, broken coral shell, shallows
  Ambiance: serene joyful coastal morning

LIBRARY LOCATIONS TO MATCH (1 selected by user):
- Library Location ID: 01KRMKES6TX2WRRR7QDVHEVF1Q
  Name: Sunlit Loft Studio
  Description: Airy industrial loft with exposed brick, massive arched windows flooding warm natural light, a velvet couch, scattered art supplies, and hanging plants. Creative, intimate, and effortlessly photogenic.
  Has Reference Image: yes

REQUIREMENTS:
- Match library locations to script locations based on semantic similarity (name, description, type)
- Each library location can only match ONE script location
- Each script location can only have ONE library location match
- Only match if there's reasonable similarity (confidence > 0.5)
- Consider: location type (interior/exterior), setting, atmosphere, visual characteristics
- Note: More extracted locations than library locations. Some locations will remain unmatched.

MATCHING EXAMPLES:
- "INT. OFFICE" should match library locations like "Corporate Office", "Modern Office", etc.
- "EXT. PARK" should match "City Park", "Garden", etc.
- Consider architectural style and ambiance when matching
- If no good match exists, don't force a match

Respond with up to 1 matches, only including high-confidence matches.
